pages.text: $(bold)mediumcoreEnabled$(): enables the base mediumcore heart loss mechanics. Default true.
$(bold)lifeStealEnabled$(): enables the lifesteal PvP layer. Default false.

$(bold)lifeStealDropChance$(): chance for a Living Heart to drop on PvP kill. Range 0.0 to 1.0, or 1.0 for automatic. Default automatic, which resolves to 0.5 when both modes are active, or 1.0 when lifesteal runs alone.
$(bold)lifeStealRespawnCooldown$(): seconds after respawn during which a player cannot be lifestealed. Default 60. Range 0 to 3600.

$(bold)lifeStealHeartCap$(): informational max hearts, also consulted by external systems. Automatic by default, resolving to 10 when both modes are active, or unlimited when lifesteal runs alone. Living Heart use can exceed this cap.
